response: Theme Park Hotel and Genting Highlands are considered two distinct Malaysian businesses. Theme Park Hotel is a hotel located in Genting Highlands, Pahang, Malaysia, while Genting Highlands is a hill resort developed by the Genting Group, located in Bentong, Pahang. Both are part of the Genting Highlands area, which also includes the Maxims Hotel, Genting Grand Hotel, and the Mohamed Noah Foundation Mosque. The 2013 Genting Highlands bus crash highlighted the presence of the Genting Sempah–Genting Highlands Highway, a private road owned by Genting Berhad. Additionally, there is a planned 20th Century Fox World theme park under construction in Genting Highlands.
